name: wheelwise
description: An AI Idea Pre-review Board skill pack for routing raw ideas into quick judgments, focused evaluations, or complete Chinese pre-review packages with evidence discipline, Gate decisions, scorecards, visuals, prototypes, and execution plans.

interface.shortDescription: Route ideas into quick judgments, focused evaluations, or complete Chinese AI product pre-review packages.
interface.longDescription: WheelWise is a multi-skill AI Idea Pre-review Board for shaping raw ideas before formal development, team review, or MVP decisions. It keeps using-wheelwise as the single controller entry point, confirms one of three routes when depth is unclear, creates a report folder with report.md for every route, and loads full package contracts only when complete pre-review artifacts are needed. For full pre-review it structures ideas, classifies applicability, runs Gate0 Evidence Intake, manages project-state and evidence-board files, separates facts, assumptions, inferences, and evidence gaps, controls feasibility Gates, synthesizes product, market, customer, technical, reuse, risk, commercialization, execution, visual, and prototype review viewpoints, maps Gate2 verdicts to Chinese pre-review states, records options considered and rejected, creates comparable scorecards, turns report.md into a visualized index.html, creates an independent prototype.html or validation simulator, and produces one Chinese pre-review package folder. It does not replace real user research, business data, compliance approval, legal advice, investment judgment, or organization decisions.
defaultPrompt: Use $using-wheelwise to evaluate this product idea.
Use $using-wheelwise to decide what to build, buy, reuse, fork, or reference.

Use $using-wheelwise to create a V4.6 AI product pre-review package with report.md, project-state.md, evidence-board.md, visualized index.html, independent prototype.html, assets, review state, evidence gaps, scorecard, and validation plan for this idea.
